heading: Conclusiveness of transfers
label: 8332 Conclusiveness of transfers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6332(provisos).34 U.S.C. 854a(provisos), .June 25, 1938, ch. 690, § 20252 Stat. 1178(note).34 U.S.C. 854(3d sentence), .July 9, 1952, ch. 608, § 80366 Stat. 505The words “when not on active duty, to retainer pay or retired pay” are substituted for the words “pay and allowances”. The pay and allowances of a member on active duty are covered by the Career Compensation Act of 1949 ( et seq.). When not on active duty a member of the Fleet Reserve receives retainer pay and a retired member receives retired pay without allowances, the provision for allowances for retired members having been repealed as pointed out in the note on the preceding section. In the last sentence the words “from the date of transfer” are added to make it clear that a correction is retroactive to that date. The Court of Claims has so held ( (1943), 100 Ct. Cl. 7).37 U.S.C. 231Dugan v. United States

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 6332 of this title1958— substituted “to retainer pay or retired pay in accordance” for “to retain pay or retired pay in accordance”.Pub. L. 85–861inserted “or the Retired Reserve” after “Navy” in cl. (3) and after “Marine Corps” in cl. (4).Pub. L. 85–583

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
Effective Date of 1958 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 85–861section 33(g) of Pub. L. 85–861section 101 of this titleAug. 10, 1956

children.text: to the Fleet Marine Corps Reserve;
from the Fleet Reserve to the retired list of the Regular Navy or the Retired Reserve; or
from the Fleet Marine Corps Reserve to the retired list of the Regular Marine Corps or the Retired Reserve;
